prompt: Substitute the coronaviruses in the source image with influenza viruses from the reference, keeping the source image’s color scheme intact.
prompt_refined: Edit image 1 (source image). Replace the four coronaviruses with influenza viruses, using image 2 (reference image) as a guide for their structure and general appearance. Ensure the substituted influenza viruses adopt the distinct purple and yellow coloration characteristic of the coronaviruses in image 1, while preserving the original magenta background of image 1.
objects: Four purple and yellow influenza viruses
